title: Purely Poached Filipino Chicken Biryani
description: A fresh and aerated Filipino dish featuring chicken stock and confit-tomato, perfect for a brunch mood, and is egg-free friendly, cooked to perfection in a bamboo steamer.

ingredients.name: bamboo steamer
ingredients.notes: large enough to hold all ingredients

instructions: Rinse the jasmine rice and soak it in water for 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the chicken stock, confit tomato, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Drain the soaked jasmine rice and add it to the bamboo steamer.
Add the chicken and stock mixture to the steamer, making sure that the rice is covered with the liquid.
Cover the steamer with a lid and steam over boiling water for 20 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
